roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DEFT ATC MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT FILED

CONTD PROGRESS REPORT/CAL:SENTENCING/INTC/X:THE COURT INDICATES SENTENCE ON COUNTS 1 AND 2 ARE THE SAME AND CONCURRENT AS FOLLOWS:/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB3 Y:PJ 64D/CTS:64/IND/X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL ENTER AND COMPLETE A 3 MONTH RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE ABUSE TREATMENT PROGRAM THROUGH LATINO COMMISSION OR ASIMILAR PROGRAM,/X:THE COURT NOTES IF DEFENDANT COMPLETES THE TREATMENT PROGRAM HE WILL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED AS IF IT WERE SERVED IN CUSTODY,  HOWEVER, IF THE PROGRAM IS NOT COMPLETED DEFENDANT WILL NOT RECEIVE ANY CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IN THE PROGRAM,/ /WS/RESTV/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/PC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT ON 02-03-16/PROG:03-15-16/CONTD:APD PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:DEFENDANT IN TREATMENT PROGRAM,/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/INTC/X:THE COURT GRANTS PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION FORMISDEMEANOR REDUCTION AS TO COUNT 1 PURSUANT TO PC 17(B),/TEXT:DEFT ADV &PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:001 AND 002/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/VD:02-05-16 JURY TRIAL/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/NTW/LDTR:02-29-16/CONTD:CJC ELIG REFERRAL/DOP/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/CONTD:JURY TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/WIT SWORN:OFFICER RYAN JENSEN    /WIT SWORN:OFFICER JUSTIN CLAYTON/HTA1:1/871D:2 & 3/BAIL:20000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION, TRAILING #16006427/CTORD:PROBATION IN #15026744 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/INTC/
CONTD TS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S11/TBH:16006427/PROB ADM REV/SHER/BAIL:1,000/
/BWR: 03-15-16 /BWR1/NC/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO APD/CONTD: 04-25-16, APD PROG REPORT/DOP/
/CAL:CJC ELIG REFERRAL/X:DEFENDANT NOT ELIGIBLE FOR CJC/X:COURT CONFIRM FUTURE DATES/CONTD:PRETRIAL/DOP/
/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:12-17-15/987,2/BAIL:20000     /CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
